provenance.prompt: hand-painted fantasy RPG inventory icon, single item centered on solid dark navy background, painterly brushwork, warm top-left lighting, rich earth tones with jewel accents, clean silhouette, concept art quality, silver amulet pendant hanging from a fine chain, oval-cut deep blue sapphire set in an ornate silver bezel with delicate filigree scrollwork around the border, the sapphire catches light with a bright star-shaped specular highlight, the silver has a soft aged patina, elegant and compact proportions
provenance.negative_prompt: blurry, text, letters, runes, watermark, signature, 3d render, ambient occlusion, photorealistic, photograph, multiple items, two objects, cropped, cut off, pixel art, cel-shaded, flat shading, neon colors, gradient background, white background, light background, modern, sci-fi, futuristic, low quality, deformed, extra limbs, frame, border, vignette

judgment.explanation: Silver pendant, deep blue stone, fine chain, dark bg. Slightly warmer tones than base. Good filigree detail. Clean icon.
